skip_audit.reason: Reference index/header — no behavior to pin. Tracked here so the auditor reports zero orphan sections.

Index of other reference docs — no contract to test.
Reference principle (no duplicate utility modules) — enforced by code review and the residual-import grep checklist, not by an automated contract.

Reference rules for SemVer bump triggers — enforced by the implement:* lifecycle and CI version-monotonic checks, not by an architecture-level contract.
Deferred features rationale (no microservices, no web UI, no plugin loader, etc.) — design record, not a behavior contract.
Module dependency diagram and direction rules — structural reference enforced by code review and the residual-import grep checklist, not an automated contract.
State ownership table — design principle enforced by the pipeline lock and single-writer discipline in code review, not a standalone automated contract.
